_note: Mapping from OSM-tagged voltage (kV) to a PyPSA standard line-type name. NOT a defaults table — the numeric r/x/b/s_nom values live in PyPSA's own line_types catalogue (pypsa.Network().line_types). Setting Line.type here means PyPSA fills the electrical params at solve time. Voltages not listed → no type set → user fixes manually.
